description_long: This rifle features a long, matte-black barrel and receiver, paired with a dark wooden or synthetic fixed stock. The overall design is streamlined, with a traditional lever or bolt-action mechanism visible near the trigger guard. The barrel is cylindrical and extends well beyond the fore-end, suggesting a focus on accuracy and range. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights, with no visible scope or advanced optics. The magazine appears to be internal, integrated into the body of the rifle, and there are no visible attachments or muzzle devices. The finish is smooth and hard, with subtle textural differences between the metal and stock components.
description: A long, matte-black rifle with a fixed dark stock, iron sights, and a smooth, streamlined design. The barrel is prominent and the magazine is internal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the full length and features of the rifle, with the stock and barrel clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, showing the rifle's symmetry.
